div.p: Timers exceeding wheel range When duration > 64ms:

ol.li: If not expired, refile to correct slot

g.text: Sorted List | O(N) insert | O(1) tick

div.p: Cascading Logic When L1 completes a full rotation (64ms):

ul.li: Drain timers from the active L2 slot.
Refile L2 timers into precise L1 slots.
